items.title: CEO shake-ups in 2026: Why Berkshire isn't the one to watch
items.description: From pay packages to succession, investors have been keeping a close eye on CEOs in 2025. Harvard University executive education fellow and former Medtronic (MDT) CEO Bill George joins Market Domination to discuss the CEOs he's watching in 2026. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
